flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Colorado State University-Fort Collins rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.6k → $34.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Colorado State University-Fort Collins fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
